name: Gujarat Aatmanirbhar MSME Interest Subsidy Scheme
administered_by: Industries and Mines Department, Government of Gujarat
retrieval_text: Under the Gujarat Industrial Policy (Aatmanirbhar Gujarat Scheme), new manufacturing and service MSME units receive an interest subsidy on term loans for plant, machinery, equipment, and furniture (land and building excluded). The subsidy rate depends on taluka category: Category 1 talukas receive 7% subsidy on term loans up to Rs 35 lakh per annum for 7 years; Category 2 talukas receive 6% up to Rs 30 lakh per annum for 6 years. SC/ST entrepreneurs, women, physically challenged persons, and young entrepreneurs (below 35) receive an additional 1% subsidy, capped at a maximum of 9% across all categories. Application must be filed within one year of first loan disbursement or before commencement of commercial production. Official source: msmec.gujarat.gov.in.
documents_required: PAN Card of the MSME unit
Constitutional documents of the enterprise (e.g., Partnership Deed, Memorandum & Articles of Association)
Term Loan Sanction Letter from the lending bank/financial institution
Term Loan Account Statement showing disbursement details
Invoices/Purchase bills for Plant, Machinery, Equipment, and Furniture
Proof of Commencement of Commercial Production (e.g., First Sales Invoice, Production Register Extract)
Proof of unit's operational address (e.g., Factory License, Electricity Bill) for Taluka category verification
Bank statements of the MSME unit
Relevant Caste Certificate/Disability Certificate/Age Proof (if applying for additional subsidy)
